name: Arabian Stew
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Chicken, cooked and cut into pieces
12 ounces Fresh or canned Mushrooms, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (except for the Parmesan cheese) in a crock pot in the order listed.
2. Cover and cook on medium heat for 8-10 hours.
3. Serve with grated Parmesan cheese. Makes 20 cups.
